caption: A woman with curly hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is looking slightly to her left with a faint smile. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text, and a sign above it reads "Employee Only." To the right of the woman is a yellow vertical pillar. On-screen graphics include the "BOSS TALK 101" logo and a "PODCAST" badge. Across the sequence, the woman remains in a nearly identical position and expression, showing minimal movement as she looks toward someone or something off-camera. The lighting and composition remain consistent, with the focus centered on her as she engages in a conversation.
